# Guesshh — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand this website.

## About
Guesshh is a free multiplayer social deduction party game playable in any browser.
Players take turns asking questions to find the spy — one player who doesn't know
the secret word. No account required. Supports 3–25 players per room.

## Product
- Name: Guesshh
- Type: Browser-based multiplayer party game (Progressive Web App)
- Category: Social deduction, party game, word game
- Platform: Web (iOS Safari, Android Chrome, Desktop)
- Price: Free (Freemium — Premium plan with 1000+ words available)
- Developer: For You Digital Solutions (https://foryoudigitalsolutions.com)

## Key Features
- No download or account required
- Up to 25 players per room
- 6-character room codes + QR code joining
- Multiple spy modes (1 or more spies)
- Description Phase for remote/online play (Zoom, Discord, WhatsApp)
- Full host controls (timer, categories, difficulty)
- Available in Greek and English
- PWA installable on iOS and Android

## Gameplay Summary
One player creates a room and shares the code. All players receive the secret word
except the spy. Players ask each other questions to expose the spy without revealing
the word. After discussion, players vote to eliminate the most suspicious player.
If the spy is caught but correctly guesses the secret word, the spy wins.

## Pages
- Homepage / Landing: https://guesshh.com
- Play / Game: https://play.guesshh.com
- Privacy Policy: https://guesshh.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://guesshh.com/terms
- Cookies Policy: https://guesshh.com/cookies
